# Example corpus format for `recon fingerprints test <slug>`.
#
# This file demonstrates the expected format only. The domains below
# are Microsoft's fictional-company examples — they will not produce
# real DNS or CT matches. To actually exercise a fingerprint, supply
# your own corpus with `--corpus path/to/your-file.txt` or place one
# at `~/.recon/corpus.txt` (picked up automatically).
#
# Format: one apex per line. Blank lines and `# ...` comments are
# ignored. See CONTRIBUTING.md ("Fictional-example policy") for why
# the project does not ship a real-company corpus.

contoso.com
northwindtraders.com
fabrikam.com
tailspintoys.com
wingtiptoys.com
adventure-works.com
